name: @microvecdb/core
description: Ultra-fast, 50KB browser vector database powered by Rust + WebAssembly. 96% RAM reduction via 1-bit quantization, HNSW indexing, OPFS persistence.

scripts.build:wasm: cd ../.. && wasm-pack build crates/microvecdb-wasm --target web --out-dir pkg
scripts.build: npm run build:wasm && npm run build:ts
scripts.build:full: npm run build && npm run generate-sri
scripts.release: npm run build:full && npm publish --access public
